StageDesc_03Ev19_05.korean: 용의 둥지를 향해 (생각보다 짧은) 여정을 떠납니다.

StageDesc_03Ev19_05B.english: City Guards launch investigation, net tightening...
StageDesc_03Ev19_05B.korean: 수사에 나서는 시티가드, 점점 좁혀드는 포위망...

StageDesc_03Ev19_06.english: What happened at the Fire Dragon's Nest...?

StageDesc_03Ev19_06B.english: "Clues or not, the culprit is written in the simulation's name to begin with, isn't he?"
StageDesc_03Ev19_06B.korean: "단서고 자시고 애초에 시뮬레이션 이름에 범인이 적혀있잖아?"

StageDesc_03Ev19_07B.english: We are suspending uploads as the creator has been arrested. Thank you for your continued support of the Merlin simulation game.
StageDesc_03Ev19_07B.korean: 제작자가 체포당한 관계로 업로드를 중단합니다. 그 동안 멀린 시뮬레이션 게임을 사랑해주셔서 감사합니다.

StageDesc_03Ev20_01.english: Summer in Malta is not over yet.

StageDesc_03Ev20_01B.english: There are still a few questions remaining.
StageDesc_03Ev20_01B.korean: 아직 몇 가지 질문이 남아 있습니다.

StageDesc_03Ev20_01EX.english: Come to think of it, we made a promise like this before, didn't we?
StageDesc_03Ev20_01EX.korean: 그러고 보니, 예전에 이런 약속을 했었죠?

StageDesc_03Ev20_02.english: It seems like things are heading in the wrong direction...?
StageDesc_03Ev20_02.korean: 뭔가 잘못된 방향으로 진행되고 있는 것 같은데요…?

StageDesc_03Ev20_04.english: Who will be the one to claim the glorious first place?
StageDesc_03Ev20_04.korean: 과연 영광의 1등을 차지하는 사람은 누가 될까요?

StageDesc_03Ev20_04B.english: The place where Meropé is right now is…

StageDesc_03Ev24_01.english: Can the end justify the means?

StageDesc_03Ev24_01Ex.english: It is time to restore the land contaminated by the Iron Bug.
StageDesc_03Ev24_01Ex.korean: 철충이 오염시킨 땅을 다시 되돌릴 때입니다.

StageDesc_03Ev24_02.english: Did it end up being used as the creator originally intended?
StageDesc_03Ev24_02.korean: 제작자의 원래 의도대로 쓰이게 된 걸까요?

StageDesc_03Ev24_02B.english: To save one person is to save the world.

StageDesc_03Ev24_02Ex.english: It is time to restore the land contaminated by the Iron Bug.
StageDesc_03Ev24_02Ex.korean: 철충이 오염시킨 땅을 다시 되돌릴 때입니다.

StageDesc_03Ev24_03.english: Is there any reason not to crack the egg when the iron plate is hot?
StageDesc_03Ev24_03.korean: 철판이 달아올랐는데 계란을 깨트리지 않을 이유가 있습니까?

StageDesc_03Ev24_03B.english: If you don't escape when the water temperature rises…
StageDesc_03Ev24_03B.korean: 물의 온도가 오를 때 탈출하지 않으면…

StageDesc_03Ev24_03Ex.english: It is time to restore the land contaminated by the Iron Bug.
StageDesc_03Ev24_03Ex.korean: 철충이 오염시킨 땅을 다시 되돌릴 때입니다.

StageDesc_03Ev24_04.english: In a world overrun by Iron Bug, there is no such thing as a safe rear.
StageDesc_03Ev24_04.korean: 철충이 횡횅하는 세계에 안전한 후방이란 존재하지 않습니다.

StageDesc_03Ev24_04B.english: Reality can be more dramatic than drama.
StageDesc_03Ev24_04B.korean: 현실은 드라마보다 더 드라마틱할 수 있습니다.

StageDesc_03Ev24_05.english: While preparing for the operation, the Iron Bug launched the first offensive. And…
StageDesc_03Ev24_05.korean: 작전을 준비하던 중 철충이 먼저 공세를 취했습니다. 그리고…

StageDesc_03Ev24_06.english: On that day, gold came down from space.

StageDesc_03Ev24_07.english: What you have lost may be great. However, thanks to this, you have preserved and gained things.
StageDesc_03Ev24_07.korean: 잃은 것은 클지도 모릅니다. 하지만 덕분에 지킨 것과 얻은 것이 있습니다.

StageDesc_03Ev24_08.english: It is better to have something precious than something valuable.
StageDesc_03Ev24_08.korean: 귀중한 것보다는 소중한 것이 더 좋습니다.

StageDesc_03Ev33_07.korean: 도와주길 원한다면 성의를 보여야 할 거 아니야 성의를!

StageDesc_03Ev33_09.english: Ugh... Do you guys actually like that?

StageDesc_03Ev33_10.english: It turns out I wasn't as bad a guy as I thought.
StageDesc_03Ev33_10.korean: 알고 보니 난 생각보다 나쁜 녀석은 아니었다.

StageDesc_04Ev33_05.english: Inabi, a member of Orca, moves forward.

StageDesc_04Ev33_06.english: There is a cat in Orca.

StageDesc_04Ev33_08.korean: 검은 고양이는 더 많은 사랑이 필요하다.

StageDesc_04Ev33_10.english: Someone I want to stand next to.

StageDesc_09_01.english: All the Lemonades except Alpha held an emergency meeting.
StageDesc_09_01.korean: 알파를 제외한 모든 레모네이드들이 긴급회의를 가졌습니다.

StageDesc_09_01Ex.english: The characters who have come down from the stage each move forward in a new direction.
StageDesc_09_01Ex.korean: 무대에서 내려온 등장인물들은, 각자 새로운 방향을 향해 나아갑니다.

StageDesc_09_02.english: The operation begins with securing a bridgehead.

StageDesc_09_02Ex.english: Eva is helping out again this time, but I can't just accept it in a positive light.
StageDesc_09_02Ex.korean: 이번에도 도움을 주는 에바이지만, 마냥 좋게만 받아들일 수는 없네요.

StageDesc_09_03.english: Everyone who was supposed to participate in the emergency meeting has gathered, but who else came?
StageDesc_09_03.korean: 긴급 대책 회의에 참여할 사람은 다 모였는데, 누가 더 온 거죠?

StageDesc_09_03Ex.english: If you have lived several times longer than others, your thoughts and actions are bound to be different.
StageDesc_09_03Ex.korean: 남들의 몇 배를 더 살아온 이라면 생각과 행동이 다를 수밖에요.

StageDesc_09_04.english: So you are an inside collaborator.

StageDesc_09_04B.english: The standard way to start a war is with big ships and big guns.

StageDesc_09_04Ex.english: What would a continent that has been virtually isolated for decades look like?
StageDesc_09_04Ex.korean: 수십 년간 사실상 고립되어 있었던 대륙은 어떤 모습일까요?

StageDesc_09_05.english: Regretting trying versus regretting not trying. Which one leaves more regret?
StageDesc_09_05.korean: 해보고 후회하는 것과 안 해보고 후회하는 것. 둘 중 뭐가 더 후회가 남을까요.

StageDesc_09_05B.english: In the face of massive volume, any strategy or tactic is nothing more than a petty trick.
StageDesc_09_05B.korean: 막대한 물량 앞에선 어떤 전략과 전술도 잔재주에 불과합니다.

StageDesc_09_06.english: There are also places where the value of life is not respected.
StageDesc_09_06.korean: 생명의 가치를 존중받지 못하는 곳도 있습니다.

StageDesc_09_06B.english: For a long time, Gamma has been looking forward to this moment.
StageDesc_09_06B.korean: 오랜 세월동안, 감마는 이 순간만을 바라왔습니다.

StageDesc_09_07B.english: The greater the expectation, the greater the sense of betrayal.

StageDesc_09_08.english: Gamma's flagship, having breached the defense line, is attempting to blow up the entire international airport.
StageDesc_09_08.korean: 방어선을 돌파한 감마의 기함이 국제 공항을 통째로 날려버리려 합니다.

StageDesc_10_01Ex.english: The one word that remained in my heart, I ultimately could not finish saying.
StageDesc_10_01Ex.korean: 심중에 남아 있는 말 한마디는 끝끝내 마저 하지 못했습니다.

StageDesc_10_02.english: A sudden explosion at a base without combat units…

StageDesc_10_02B.english: A battlefield is originally like a foggy morning, filled with uncertain elements.
StageDesc_10_02B.korean: 전장이란 본디 안개 낀 아침과 같아, 불확실한 요소가 즐비합니다.

StageDesc_10_02Ex.english: The results of a battle can be maximized only after victory is assured.
StageDesc_10_02Ex.korean: 전투의 성과는 승리가 확정된 이후에 최대화 할 수 있습니다.

StageDesc_10_03.english: We have been preparing for this operation for a very long time.
StageDesc_10_03.korean: 이번 작전을 위해 아주 오래전부터 준비했습니다.

StageDesc_10_03B.english: A spear that pierces anything and a shield that blocks anything are with you.
StageDesc_10_03B.korean: 무엇이든 뚫는 창과 무엇이든 막아내는 방패가 당신과 함께합니다.

StageDesc_10_03Ex.english: She has only one chance for revenge.
StageDesc_10_03Ex.korean: 그녀에게 복수의 기회는 딱 한 번 뿐입니다.

StageDesc_10_04.english: There is something that you can never give up on for anyone.
StageDesc_10_04.korean: 누구에게도 절대로 포기하지 못하는 것이 있습니다.

StageDesc_10_04B.english: Today's weather is cloudy, and from time to time, bombs fall instead of meatballs.
StageDesc_10_04B.korean: 오늘 날씨는 흐리고, 때때로 미트볼 대신 폭탄이 내립니다.

StageDesc_10_04Ex.english: Orca's enemies are not just those with PECS.
StageDesc_10_04Ex.korean: 오르카의 적은 PECS만 있는 게 아닙니다.

StageDesc_10_05B.english: There are many differences between biooids and AGS, but both carry an indomitable spirit in their hearts.
StageDesc_10_05B.korean: 바이오로이드와 AGS 사이에는 많은 차이점이 있지만, 둘 모두 가슴 속에 불굴의 정신을 품고 있답니다.

StageDesc_10_06.english: The objective is the capture of Delta's adjutant.

StageDesc_10_07.english: To catch a tiger, you have to go into the tiger's den.
StageDesc_10_07.korean: 호랑이를 잡기 위해선 호랑이 굴에 들어가야 합니다.

StageDesc_10_07B.english: Lead and gunpowder have thrown a big festival, so it's time to clean up the leftovers.
StageDesc_10_07B.korean: 납과 화약이 한바탕 축제를 벌였으니, 남은 것들을 정리할 시간입니다.

StageDesc_10_08.english: Delta's adjutant, the devil of the laboratory, the eldest sister of the three sisters, the sister killer
StageDesc_10_08.korean: 델타의 부관, 연구소의 악마, 세 자매의 맏언니, 자매 살해자

StageDesc_11_01.english: Can I trust Taylor Rise Cut?

StageDesc_11_01Ex.english: I think there is a spy among them.
StageDesc_11_01Ex.korean: 이 중에 스파이가 있는 거 같습니다.​

StageDesc_11_02.english: For a secret weapon to be effective, a solid strategic foundation must be established.
StageDesc_11_02.korean: 비밀 병기가 활약하기 위해서는 튼튼한 전략적 기반이 마련되어야 합니다.​

StageDesc_11_02B.english: To the girl who was a test subject, to the girl who was a test subject.

StageDesc_11_02Ex.english: It seems that the Iron bug has notified Omega to come under its control.
StageDesc_11_02Ex.korean: 철충이 오메가에게 자신의 지배하에 들어오라고 통보한 것 같습니다.​

StageDesc_11_03.english: While on a mission in Europe, Phantom and Wraith accidentally discover Delta's new weapon.
StageDesc_11_03.korean: 유럽에서 임무를 수행하던 팬텀과 레이스는 우연히 델타의 새로운 병기를 발견하게 됩니다.​

StageDesc_11_03B.english: Delta probably didn't know that Orca already had a solution to brainwashing.
StageDesc_11_03B.korean: 델타는 이미 오르카가 세뇌에 대한 해결책을 가지고 있는 것을 몰랐을 겁니다.​

StageDesc_11_03Ex.english: Orca's member, administrator of Europe, eldest sister of three sisters, the saved one
StageDesc_11_03Ex.korean: 오르카의 대원, 유럽의 관리자, 세 자매의 맏언니, 구원받은 자​

StageDesc_11_04.english: Finally, Orca's elite forces began a large-scale amphibious landing operation in Europe.
StageDesc_11_04.korean: 마침내 오르카의 정예군이 유럽에 대규모 상륙 작전을 펼치기 시작했습니다.

StageDesc_11_04B.english: No matter who the opponent is, hold out and crush them.

StageDesc_11_04Ex.english: Orca took a step forward. However, the road ahead is still long.
StageDesc_11_04Ex.korean: 오르카는 한 걸음을 내딛었습니다. 그러나 아직 갈 길은 멉니다.​

StageDesc_11_05.english: For Orca, the Stronghold Legion and the Tyrant. And for Delta…
StageDesc_11_05.korean: 오르카에는 스트롱홀드 군단과 타이런트. 그리고 델타에게는…​

StageDesc_11_05B.english: The original captain of the Armored Maidens.

StageDesc_11_06.english: No one can stop Orca's advance.
StageDesc_11_06.korean: 그 누구도 오르카의 진격을 막을 수 없습니다.​

StageDesc_11_07.english: To draw out a deeply entrenched enemy, you have to let them know that they can't just stay holed up.
StageDesc_11_07.korean: 꽁꽁 틀어박힌 적을 이끌어내려면 틀어박혀만 있으면 안 된다는 것을 알려줘야죠.​

StageDesc_11_08.english: The end of an enemy, the fruition of revenge.

StageDesc_12N01_01.english: The identity of the helper who appeared in front of Yumi is…

StageDesc_12N01_02.english: A story of the past told by a shepherd.

StageDesc_12N01_03.english: He/She is also a friend of tomorrow.

StageDesc_12N01_04.english: Is it the red pill or the blue pill?

StageDesc_12N01_05.english: Do not make a deal with the devil.

StageDesc_12N01_06.english: I am the captain of the city guard.

StageDesc_12N01_07.english: The City Guard has come here for your safety and peace.
StageDesc_12N01_07.korean: 여러분의 안전과 평화를 위해 시티가드가 여기 왔습니다.​

StageDesc_12N01_08.english: The way to root out evil.

StageDesc_12N02_04Ex.english: It would be troublesome if you confuse it with a card game with a similar name.

StageDesc_12N02_05B.english: The watcher obtained information about the Yeti and organized an expedition team.
StageDesc_12N02_05B.korean: 와쳐가 예티에 대한 정보를 입수하고 탐사대를 구성했습니다.

StageDesc_12N02_05Ex.english: An evil supervillain and also a friend of children.

StageDesc_12N02_06B.english: Satgat wandered around Orca looking for an AGS that would become his companion.
StageDesc_12N02_06B.korean: 삿갓이 오르카에서 자신의 반려가 될 AGS를 찾으러 돌아다녔습니다.

StageDesc_12N02_06Ex.english: Aren’t you interpreting the phrase ‘Spring and Autumn Together in May’ too literally?
StageDesc_12N02_06Ex.korean: 오월동주라는 말을 너무 문자 그대로 해석한 것 아닌가요?

StageDesc_12N02_07B.english: The Kohei religious sect made various plans to expand its influence.
